name: io.github.ogasurfproject-jpg/hs-webmcp
title: HORIZON SHIELD WebMCP (KIRA)
description: Neutral, independent construction-cost estimate-integrity desk for Japan. Bridges homeowner renovation quotes to a fair-price audit over an open construction-cost database (JCCDB, 65,729 items). Exposes tools (estimate intake, overcharge-tactic scan, awareness draft, one-call orchestrate), resources (cost categories, price ranges, dataset info, EHN), and prompts (diagnose_my_estimate, how_to_read_an_estimate). Verifiable first-party prices only; no auto-posting; no auth (public read-only desk).
